name: Action Contract
summary: Framework-free action contract with zod schema validation, registry, context injection, and structured error handling.

source.notes: Extracted from the defineAction pattern used across all three apps. Removes agent-native, H3, React Query, and app-state dependencies.

caveats: ExecutionContext typing is generic; extend TContext for your app's request/session shape.
Mutation retry safety: do not replay after a mutating action execution.
whenNotToUse: Do not use when actions need implicit request-context — context must be injected explicitly.
Do not use when the framework's native action system (e.g. agent-native defineAction) provides sufficient value for your use case.
